title: selaginella kerstingii
intro: Selaginella kerstingii, a type of resurrection fern, is a plant species that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and swelling, as well as aiding in the treatment of skin infections. Selaginella kerstingii can be prepared as a tea, powder, or extract, making it accessible for herbal preparations, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
